classifieds_97.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to correctly interpret "designed in the shape of an animal." It selected "2 Zebra Pillows," which have an animal *pattern* (zebra print), but are not *shaped* like an animal. The objective requires finding an item whose physical form resembles an animal.
classifieds_97.REFLECTION: When searching for items "designed in the shape of an animal," prioritize items whose physical form or structure explicitly resembles an animal, rather than items that merely feature an animal print or pattern. Carefully examine item descriptions and images to confirm the shape. If the first item found with an animal-related characteristic does not meet the "shape" criteria, continue searching for other items.
